{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01VBM7VpZiTYibkFVykuwpmo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01ANNrCY9zDqD94B7AsgbVw1","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/clone.html","content":"<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=800\">\n  <title>PulseHub</title>\n  <style>\n    *, *::before, *::after {\n      box-sizing: border-box;\n      margin: 0;\n      padding: 0;\n    }\n\n    body {\n      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;\n      background-color: #FEF2E7;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      width: 800px;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Header ── */\n    .header {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 14px 48px;\n      border-bottom: 1px solid #DCCEBE;\n    }\n\n    .logo {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .logo-name {\n      font-size: 19px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      letter-spacing: -0.2px;\n    }\n\n    .badge {\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      color: #fff;\n      font-size: 11.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      padding: 3px 9px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .nav {\n      display: flex;\n      gap: 30px;\n      align-items: center;\n    }\n\n    .nav a {\n      color: #2e2e2e;\n      text-decoration: none;\n      font-size: 14.5px;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Hero ── */\n    .hero {\n      text-align: center;\n      padding: 70px 60px 54px;\n    }\n\n    .hero h1 {\n      font-size: 52px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      line-height: 1.15;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n      letter-spacing: -1.2px;\n    }\n\n    .hero .subtitle {\n      font-size: 18px;\n      color: #666;\n      font-style: italic;\n      margin-bottom: 36px;\n    }\n\n    .buttons {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .btn-signup {\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      color: #fff;\n      border: none;\n      padding: 13px 34px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      font-size: 15.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: inherit;\n    }\n\n    .btn-demo {\n      background-color: #fff;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      border: 1.5px solid #C8B8A4;\n      padding: 13px 34px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      font-size: 15.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: inherit;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Feature Cards ── */\n    .features {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 14px;\n      padding: 0 48px 50px;\n    }\n\n    .card {\n      padding: 28px 28px 34px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n    }\n\n    .card-light {\n      background-color: #FAF0DC;\n    }\n\n    .card-warm {\n      background-color: #ECD8BA;\n    }\n\n    .icon-box {\n      width: 46px;\n      height: 46px;\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      border-radius: 11px;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      margin-bottom: 22px;\n    }\n\n    .card h3 {\n      font-size: 16.5px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .card p {\n      font-size: 14px;\n      color: #666;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Footer ── */\n    .footer {\n      border-top: 1px solid #DCCEBE;\n      padding: 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      color: #777;\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n  <header class=\"header\">\n    <div class=\"logo\">\n      <span class=\"logo-name\">PulseHub</span>\n      <span class=\"badge\">v2.0</span>\n    </div>\n    <nav class=\"nav\">\n      <a href=\"#\">Blog</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Customers</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Company</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Product</a>\n    </nav>\n  </header>\n\n  <section class=\"hero\">\n    <h1>Tools that just get out of your way.</h1>\n    <p class=\"subtitle\">Less yak-shaving. More shipping.</p>\n    <div class=\"buttons\">\n      <button class=\"btn-signup\">Sign up</button>\n      <button class=\"btn-demo\">Live demo</button>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <div class=\"features\">\n\n    <!-- Smart caching -->\n    <div class=\"card card-light\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"white\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n          <path d=\"M13 2L4.5 13.5H11L9.5 22L19.5 10.5H13L13 2Z\"/>\n        </svg>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Smart caching</h3>\n      <p>Every change recorded. Compliance, made simple.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Type-safe APIs -->\n    <div class=\"card card-warm\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n          <polygon points=\"12,2 21,6.5 21,17.5 12,22 3,17.5 3,6.5\"/>\n        </svg>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Type-safe APIs</h3>\n      <p>Deploys close to your users automatically.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- One-click deploy -->\n    <div class=\"card card-light\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"white\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n          <path d=\"M12 3L5 12H9V21H15V12H19L12 3Z\"/>\n        </svg>\n      </div>\n      <h3>One-click deploy</h3>\n      <p>Roles, invites, and SSO out of the box.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Zero config -->\n    <div class=\"card card-warm\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"2\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\">\n          <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\"/>\n          <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"4\"/>\n          <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"1\" fill=\"white\" stroke=\"none\"/>\n        </svg>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Zero config</h3>\n      <p>Ship to production with a single command.</p>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>\n\n  <footer class=\"footer\">\n    <p>© 2026 PulseHub. All rights reserved.</p>\n  </footer>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10681,"cache_read_input_tokens":18582,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":10681,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c56419bd-1ce0-4b27-b944-b3254b00895e","uuid":"55392b8e-6b98-4053-bad4-75776a18833d","request_id":"req_011Cb4YBMKGVj8ZZrKu462Rh"}

html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=800\">\n  <title>PulseHub</title>\n  <style>\n    *, *::before, *::after {\n      box-sizing: border-box;\n      margin: 0;\n      padding: 0;\n    }\n\n    body {\n      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;\n      background-color: #FEF2E7;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      width: 800px;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Header ── */\n    .header {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: space-between;\n      align-items: center;\n      padding: 15px 48px;\n      border-bottom: 1px solid #DDD0C0;\n    }\n\n    .logo {\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      gap: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .logo-name {\n      font-size: 19px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      letter-spacing: -0.2px;\n    }\n\n    .badge {\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      color: #fff;\n      font-size: 11.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      padding: 3px 9px;\n      border-radius: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .nav {\n      display: flex;\n      gap: 30px;\n    }\n\n    .nav a {\n      color: #2a2a2a;\n      text-decoration: none;\n      font-size: 14.5px;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Hero ── */\n    .hero {\n      text-align: center;\n      padding: 68px 60px 52px;\n    }\n\n    .hero h1 {\n      font-size: 52px;\n      font-weight: 800;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      line-height: 1.15;\n      margin-bottom: 20px;\n      letter-spacing: -1.2px;\n    }\n\n    .hero .subtitle {\n      font-size: 18px;\n      color: #666;\n      font-style: italic;\n      margin-bottom: 36px;\n    }\n\n    .buttons {\n      display: flex;\n      justify-content: center;\n      gap: 14px;\n    }\n\n    .btn-signup {\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      color: #fff;\n      border: none;\n      padding: 13px 32px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      font-size: 15.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: inherit;\n    }\n\n    .btn-demo {\n      background-color: #fff;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      border: 1.5px solid #C8BAA8;\n      padding: 13px 32px;\n      border-radius: 10px;\n      font-size: 15.5px;\n      font-weight: 600;\n      cursor: pointer;\n      font-family: inherit;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Feature Cards ── */\n    .features {\n      display: grid;\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n      gap: 14px;\n      padding: 0 48px 48px;\n    }\n\n    .card {\n      padding: 28px 28px 34px;\n      border-radius: 18px;\n    }\n\n    .card-light {\n      background-color: #FBF0DE;\n    }\n\n    .card-warm {\n      background-color: #EDD9BC;\n    }\n\n    .icon-box {\n      width: 46px;\n      height: 46px;\n      background-color: #E76329;\n      border-radius: 11px;\n      display: flex;\n      align-items: center;\n      justify-content: center;\n      margin-bottom: 22px;\n      color: #fff;\n      font-size: 21px;\n      line-height: 1;\n    }\n\n    /* Custom CSS icons */\n    .icon-lightning {\n      width: 12px;\n      height: 22px;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n    .icon-lightning::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 0;\n      left: 3px;\n      width: 0;\n      height: 0;\n      border-left: 6px solid transparent;\n      border-right: 3px solid transparent;\n      border-bottom: 12px solid #fff;\n    }\n    .icon-lightning::after {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      bottom: 0;\n      right: 3px;\n      width: 0;\n      height: 0;\n      border-left: 3px solid transparent;\n      border-right: 6px solid transparent;\n      border-top: 12px solid #fff;\n    }\n\n    .icon-hexagon {\n      width: 20px;\n      height: 20px;\n      background: #fff;\n      clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 93% 25%, 93% 75%, 50% 100%, 7% 75%, 7% 25%);\n    }\n\n    .icon-arrow-up {\n      width: 0;\n      height: 0;\n      border-left: 7px solid transparent;\n      border-right: 7px solid transparent;\n      border-bottom: 14px solid #fff;\n      position: relative;\n      top: -3px;\n    }\n\n    .icon-target {\n      width: 20px;\n      height: 20px;\n      border: 3px solid #fff;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n      position: relative;\n    }\n    .icon-target::before {\n      content: '';\n      position: absolute;\n      top: 50%;\n      left: 50%;\n      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n      width: 7px;\n      height: 7px;\n      background: #fff;\n      border-radius: 50%;\n    }\n\n    .card h3 {\n      font-size: 16.5px;\n      font-weight: 700;\n      color: #1a1a1a;\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\n    }\n\n    .card p {\n      font-size: 14px;\n      color: #666;\n      line-height: 1.6;\n    }\n\n    /* ── Footer ── */\n    .footer {\n      border-top: 1px solid #DDD0C0;\n      padding: 28px;\n      text-align: center;\n      font-size: 14px;\n      color: #777;\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n  <header class=\"header\">\n    <div class=\"logo\">\n      <span class=\"logo-name\">PulseHub</span>\n      <span class=\"badge\">v2.0</span>\n    </div>\n    <nav class=\"nav\">\n      <a href=\"#\">Blog</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Customers</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Company</a>\n      <a href=\"#\">Product</a>\n    </nav>\n  </header>\n\n  <section class=\"hero\">\n    <h1>Tools that just get out of your way.</h1>\n    <p class=\"subtitle\">Less yak-shaving. More shipping.</p>\n    <div class=\"buttons\">\n      <button class=\"btn-signup\">Sign up</button>\n      <button class=\"btn-demo\">Live demo</button>\n    </div>\n  </section>\n\n  <div class=\"features\">\n    <div class=\"card card-light\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <div class=\"icon-lightning\"></div>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Smart caching</h3>\n      <p>Every change recorded. Compliance, made simple.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"card card-warm\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <div class=\"icon-hexagon\"></div>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Type-safe APIs</h3>\n      <p>Deploys close to your users automatically.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"card card-light\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\" style=\"flex-direction:column;gap:2px;\">\n        <div class=\"icon-arrow-up\"></div>\n        <div style=\"width:14px;height:3px;background:#fff;border-radius:1px;margin-top:3px;\"></div>\n      </div>\n      <h3>One-click deploy</h3>\n      <p>Roles, invites, and SSO out of the box.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"card card-warm\">\n      <div class=\"icon-box\">\n        <div class=\"icon-target\"></div>\n      </div>\n      <h3>Zero config</h3>\n      <p>Ship to production with a single command.</p>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <footer class=\"footer\">\n    <p>© 2026 PulseHub. All rights reserved.</p>\n  </footer>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n","userModified":false}}
